LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'S MOTION REQUESTING DIRECTION FROM THE COURT REGARDING THE APPOINTMENT OF A COURT APPOINTED RECEIVER. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - PLAINTIFF MAY RETAIN FUNDS PAID BY DEFENDANT AND FILE THE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. THE RECEIVER IS DIRECTED TO FILE REQUEST FOR DISCHARGE, A FINAL ACCOUNTING AND APPLICATION FOR FEE. FURTHERMORE DEFENDANTS MUST PAY THE RECEIVER'S FEE AS A CONDITION OF REINSTATEMENT OF THE LIQUOR LICENSE. RECEIVER'S MOTION TO APPROVE THE SALE OF THE LIQUOR LICENSE IS DENIED. IN ADDITION, THE COURT NOTED THAT THIS MATTER WAS CONTINUED FROM 04/25/11 FOR THE RECEIVER TO FILE AN INDEPENDENT ACCOUNTING. NO DOCUMENTS WERE FILED (AS OF/UP TO THE TIME OF HEARING). THE COURT ORDERED THE RECEIVER TO FILE THE ACCOUNTING/ALL DOCUMENTS NO LATER THAN 05/16/11. (PARTIES NOTIFIED BY THE COURT.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For An Order Approving The Disbursement Of Funds Held In Trust To The Pltf Subject To The Transfer Of The Deft'S Liquor License; Pos
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion For An Order Approving The Disbursement Of Funds Held In Trust To The Plaintiff Subject To The Transfer Of The Defendant's Liquor License is granted as unopposed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/CK)

Ntc Of Motion Requesting Direction From The Court Appointment
Off Calendar May-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S MOTION REQUESTING DIRECTION FROM THE COURT REGARDING THE APPOINTMENT OF A COURT APPOINTED RECEIVER.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - PLAINTIFF MAY RETAIN FUNDS PAID BY DEFENDANT AND FILE THE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. THE RECEIVER IS DIRECTED TO FILE REQUEST FOR DISCHARGE, A FINAL ACCOUNTING AND APPLICATION FOR FEE. FURTHERMORE DEFENDANTS MUST PAY THE RECEIVER'S FEE AS A CONDITION OF REINSTATEMENT OF THE LIQUOR LICENSE. RECEIVER'S MOTION TO APPROVE THE SALE OF THE LIQUOR LICENSE IS DENIED.
In addition, the Court noted that this matter was continued from 04/25/11 for the receiver to file an independent accounting. No documents were filed (as of/up to the time of hearing). The Court ordered the receiver to file the accounting/all documents no later than 05/16/11. (Parties notified by the Court.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Ntc Of Motion Requesting Direction From The Court Appointment
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Continued To May-05-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S MOTION REQUESTING DIRECTION FROM THE COURT REGARDING THE APPOINTMENT OF A COURT APPOINTED RECEIVER.

APPEARANCES: Douglas B. Provencher, Esq. of Provencher & Flatt LLP 707/284-2380 for pltf & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); Richard B. Cole, Receiver 408/297-2587.

RULING: Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 05/05/11 at 9:30am. Receiver to file documents with independent accounting by 04/29/11. Any response to be filed by 05/03/11. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sancitons
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver;
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Gregory Noto, Judgment Debtor, in Propria Persona

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
